title: Restore the Array From Adjacent Pairs
titleCn: 从相邻元素对还原数组

testcases.input: adjacentPairs = [[2,1],[3,4],[3,2]] Output: [1,2,3,4] Explanation: This array has all its adjacent pairs in adjacentPairs. Notice that adjacentPairs[i] may not be in left-to-right order.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,2,3,4] Explanation: This array has all its adjacent pairs in adjacentPairs. Notice that adjacentPairs[i] may not be in left-to-right order.

testcases.input: adjacentPairs = [[4,-2],[1,4],[-3,1]] Output: [-2,4,1,-3] Explanation: There can be negative numbers. Another solution is [-3,1,4,-2], which would also be accepted.
testcases.expectedOutput: [-2,4,1,-3] Explanation: There can be negative numbers. Another solution is [-3,1,4,-2], which would also be accepted.
